name: jisonull
description: A parser generator with a Bison/YACC-similar API (derived off zaach/jison repo)

scripts.build:transpile: babel dist/jison-cjs.js -o dist/jison-cjs-es5.js && babel dist/jison-umd.js -o dist/jison-umd-es5.js && babel dist/cli-cjs.js -o dist/cli-cjs-es5.js && babel dist/cli-umd.js -o dist/cli-umd-es5.js && node __patch_nodebang_in_js.js
scripts.build: npm run build:patch && npm run build:packages && npm run build:rollup && npm run build:transpile
scripts.pub:all: npm run pub --workspaces --if-present && npm run pub
scripts.test: npm run test --workspaces --if-present && mocha --timeout 18000 --check-leaks --globals assert --recursive tests/
scripts.test-nyc: npm run clean-nyc && npm run test-nyc --workspaces --if-present && nyc --reporter=lcov --reporter=text --exclude 'examples/issue-lex*.js' -- mocha --timeout 18000 --check-leaks --globals assert --recursive tests/ && npm run report-nyc
scripts.site: npm run build && npm run test && npm run examples-test
scripts.npm-update: npm run npm-update --workspaces --if-present && ncu -a --packageFile=package.json && npm install
scripts.bump: npm version --no-git-tag-version prerelease && npm run build:patch
scripts.clean: npm run clean --workspaces --if-present && rm -rf dist coverage .nyc_output
scripts.superclean: npm run superclean --workspaces --if-present && rm -rf dist coverage .nyc_output node_modules package-lock.json && find . -type d -name 'node_modules' -delete
scripts.examples-test: cd examples && npm run test 2>/dev/null || echo 'Examples build not yet set up for npm workspaces'
scripts.examples: cd examples && npm run build 2>/dev/null || echo 'Examples build not yet set up for npm workspaces'
scripts.all: npm run clean-nyc && npm run sync && npm run build && npm run test && npm run test-nyc && npm run examples-test && npm run report-nyc
scripts.everything: npm run clean && npm run npm-update && npm run prep && npm run all
